Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Chromatin regulator required for brain development: acts as a regulator of RNA elongation rate, thereby regulating neural stem cell (NSC) proliferation and synaptic transmission (PubMed:30455454, PubMed:31515109). May act by mediating trimethylation of 'Lys-36' of histone H3 (H3K36me3), which is essential to allow on-time RNA elongation dynamics (PubMed:31515109). Also monomethylates 'Lys-9' of histone H3 (H3K9me1) in vitro (PubMed:22939622). The relevance of histone methyltransferase activity is however subject to discussion (PubMed:27864380, PubMed:30455454). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:22939622, ECO:0000269|PubMed:27864380, ECO:0000269|PubMed:30455454, ECO:0000269|PubMed:31515109}.
